_comment: Per-1M-token USD prices. Single source for cost.mjs / aggregate.mjs. Mirror of skills/delegate/references/tiers.md tier bands — keep in sync when Anthropic reprices. 'in'=input, 'out'=output. Cache prices are ratios of that model's input price and are the same ratios for every model: read = 0.1x input, write(1h) = 2.0x input. Verified against `claude -p --output-format json` total_cost_usd on 2026-07-23.
